observed_facts: Water is rising near the old bridge.
Two families are reported to be stuck on the far side.
The road is cracked near the middle span.
inferred_risks: The cracked span may become unsafe for foot or vehicle crossing.
Families may become isolated if water rises further.
An elderly person may need time-sensitive medication support.
immediate_actions: Keep civilians away from the bridge and cracked road surface.
Send one trained volunteer to identify a safe access route without crossing the damaged span.
Confirm headcount and medication need by voice or line-of-sight if possible.
Transmit the radio message to command and request rescue support.
missing_information: Number and age of people stranded
Current water depth and rate of rise
radio_message: HIGH FLOOD/STRUCTURAL risk at Ward 7 old market bridge. Two families stranded beyond rising water. Road cracked near span. Keep civilians clear. Need responders, first aid, flotation aid, GPS, headcount.
audit_notes: Severity is high due to rising water, stranded families, and possible bridge damage.
Escalation is required because structural and water rescue risks are present.
